name: Bio Pappel, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Bio Pappel, S.A.B. de C.V. produces and sells paper and paper products in Mexico and the United States. It produces bond papers for copiers and printers, and notebooks; and papers for writing and printing, and other specialties, as well as recycled papers. The company also provides packaging products, comprising corrugated cardboard packaging and graphics. In addition, it offers papers for packaging, containing, and wrapping, as well as for newspapers. The company was formerly known as Corporaci√É¬≥n Durango, S.A.B. de C.V. Bio Pappel, S.A.B. de C.V. is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
